problem_title: KYT provider outputs lack operational cohesion
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to aggregate wallet risk signals and transaction monitoring data from multiple KYT providers into a unified workflow. This disconnect slows alert triage, complicates case management and weakens audit evidence across digital asset compliance operations.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY aggregates risk signals and transaction data from multiple KYT providers into a unified compliance workflow that simplifies alert triage, supports case management, and preserves audit-ready evidence for VASP operations.
workflow_title: From wallet risk alerts to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates and normalizes KYT provider outputs, routes alerts into structured case workflows, preserves evidence, and supports risk review and reporting decisions.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for KYT provider orchestration?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects multiple KYT and blockchain analytics provider outputs into a connected compliance workflow for wallet risk aggregation, transaction monitoring, case creation and regulatory rule application.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle KYT alert triage?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes KYT alerts into structured review workflows, linking wallet risk, transaction data, and cases to streamline analyst triage and escalation according to configured risk thresholds and policies.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready KYT evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and supporting KYT evidence to support audit-ready reviews and demonstrate which data and rules informed compliance decisions.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing KYT providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing KYT providers, normalizing and consolidating their outputs without requiring replacement or direct provider integration changes.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace current KYT or analytics providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYT or blockchain analytics providers but provides a neutral compliance control layer that structures and connects their outputs into actionable workflows.
final_title: Connect KYT provider outputs into structured cases
final_description: Review how SFTY aggregates KYT alerts, preserves audit evidence and supports controlled workflows for VASP compliance operations.
